title: cylindrokelupha havilandii
intro: Cylindrokelupha havilandii, also known as the African Bushman's Hat or Haviland's cylindrical hair grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are due to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cylindrokelupha havilandii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In traditional medicine, Cylindrokelupha havilandii is often prepared as a decoction by boiling the plant material in water, or as a powder by drying and grinding the leaves and stems.
